description: Standalone modules linking directly to Google Workspace APIs via simple fetch mechanisms.

modules.name: Google Auth
modules.description: Utilities for managing Google OAuth2 headers and parsing auth responses.

functions.name: getGoogleAuthHeaders
functions.description: Returns headers containing the Bearer token for Google APIs.

functions.name: validateGoogleToken
functions.description: Validates the Google access token.

functions.name: revokeGoogleToken
functions.description: Revokes the Google access token.

functions.name: getUserInfo
functions.description: Gets user information from the access token.

modules.name: Google Drive
modules.description: Interact with Google Drive files (list, get metadata, delete, create folder, move, copy, share, empty trash).

functions.name: listGoogleDriveFiles
functions.description: List files from Google Drive matching an optional query.

functions.name: getGoogleDriveFileMetadata
functions.description: Retrieve comprehensive metadata for a specific file ID.

functions.name: deleteGoogleDriveFile
functions.description: Deletes a Google Drive file permanently.

functions.name: createGoogleDriveFolder
functions.description: Creates a folder in Google Drive.

functions.name: copyGoogleDriveFile
functions.description: Copies a file in Google Drive.

functions.name: moveGoogleDriveFile
functions.description: Moves a file from one parent folder to another.

functions.name: emptyGoogleDriveTrash
functions.description: Empties the Google Drive trash.

functions.name: shareGoogleDriveFile
functions.description: Shares a file with specified permissions.

functions.name: downloadGoogleDriveMedia
functions.description: Downloads the contents of a media file as a Blob.

modules.name: Google Sheets
modules.description: Read, append, clear, batch get, and create Google Sheets.

functions.name: getGoogleSheetValues
functions.description: Reads data from a specific range.

functions.name: appendGoogleSheetValues
functions.description: Appends a 2D array of rows to a sheet.

functions.name: updateGoogleSheetValues
functions.description: Updates a specific range of values.

functions.name: clearGoogleSheetValues
functions.description: Clears a specific range of values.

functions.name: batchGetGoogleSheetValues
functions.description: Reads multiple ranges from a spreadsheet in one batch.

functions.name: createGoogleSpreadsheet
functions.description: Creates a new Google Spreadsheet.

functions.name: getGoogleSpreadsheetMetadata
functions.description: Gets metadata about the spreadsheet.

functions.name: batchUpdateGoogleSpreadsheet
functions.description: Applies a list of batch updates (requests) to a spreadsheet.

modules.name: Google Calendar
modules.description: List, create, delete calendar events, list calendars, and quick add events.

functions.name: listGoogleCalendarEvents
functions.description: Fetches upcoming events for a specified calendar.

functions.name: getGoogleCalendarEvent
functions.description: Fetches a specific event from a calendar.

functions.name: createGoogleCalendarEvent
functions.description: Inserts a new event into the specfied calendar.

functions.name: updateGoogleCalendarEvent
functions.description: Updates a specific Google Calendar event.

functions.name: deleteGoogleCalendarEvent
functions.description: Deletes a specific Google Calendar event.

functions.name: listGoogleCalendars
functions.description: Lists all calendars for the active user.

functions.name: createGoogleCalendar
functions.description: Creates a new calendar.

functions.name: quickAddGoogleCalendarEvent
functions.description: Quickly adds an event by natural language text.

modules.name: YouTube API
modules.description: Search YouTube videos, list user playlists, get video details, comment, rate.

functions.name: searchYouTubeVideos
functions.description: Search for YouTube videos by query.

functions.name: getYouTubeVideoDetails
functions.description: Fetches details for a specific video.

functions.name: listYouTubePlaylists
functions.description: Lists the authenticated user's YouTube playlists.

functions.name: getYouTubePlaylistItems
functions.description: Lists the items in a specific YouTube playlist.

functions.name: listYouTubeSubscriptions
functions.description: Lists the authenticated user's subscriptions.

functions.name: rateYouTubeVideo
functions.description: Rates a YouTube video (like/dislike/none).

functions.name: listYouTubeComments
functions.description: Lists top level comments for a YouTube video.

functions.name: insertYouTubeComment
functions.description: Inserts a comment on a YouTube video.

modules.name: Gmail API
modules.description: List, retrieve, trash, send emails, modify labels via Gmail API.

functions.name: listGmailMessages
functions.description: List messages from Gmail matching an optional query.

functions.name: getGmailMessage
functions.description: Retrieve content and metadata for a specific message.

functions.name: trashGmailMessage
functions.description: Moves a specified message to the trash.

functions.name: sendGmailMessage
functions.description: Sends an email using a raw Base64 encoded RFC 2822 formatted string.

functions.name: listGmailThreads
functions.description: List threads from Gmail matching an optional query.

functions.name: getGmailThread
functions.description: Retrieve content and metadata for a specific thread.

functions.name: modifyGmailMessageLabels
functions.description: Adds or removes labels from a specific message.

functions.name: listGmailLabels
functions.description: List all labels available to the user in Gmail.

functions.name: createGmailLabel
functions.description: Creates a new label in Gmail.

modules.name: Google Tasks
modules.description: Manage task lists and tasks within Google Tasks (CRUD operations, clear, move).

functions.name: listGoogleTaskLists
functions.description: Lists all task lists owned by the authenticated user.

functions.name: getGoogleTaskList
functions.description: Gets an existing task list.

functions.name: createGoogleTaskList
functions.description: Creates a new task list.

functions.name: updateGoogleTaskList
functions.description: Updates an existing task list.

functions.name: deleteGoogleTaskList
functions.description: Deletes the specified task list.

functions.name: listGoogleTasks
functions.description: Lists all tasks in the specified task list.

functions.name: getGoogleTask
functions.description: Gets an existing task.

functions.name: createGoogleTask
functions.description: Creates a new task on the specified task list.

functions.name: updateGoogleTask
functions.description: Updates an existing task.

functions.name: deleteGoogleTask
functions.description: Deletes the specified task from the task list.

functions.name: clearCompletedGoogleTasks
functions.description: Clears all completed tasks from the specified task list.

functions.name: moveGoogleTask
functions.description: Moves the specified task to another position in the task list.

modules.name: Google People API
modules.description: Retrieve profile information and contact lists, perform CRUD operations using People API.

functions.name: getGoogleProfile
functions.description: Gets information about the authenticated user's profile.

functions.name: getGoogleContact
functions.description: Gets details of a specific contact resource.

functions.name: listGoogleContacts
functions.description: Provides a list of the authenticated user's contacts.

functions.name: createGoogleContact
functions.description: Creates a new contact.

functions.name: updateGoogleContact
functions.description: Updates an existing contact.

functions.name: deleteGoogleContact
functions.description: Deletes an existing contact.

functions.name: searchGoogleContacts
functions.description: Searches for contacts matching a query.

functions.name: listGoogleContactGroups
functions.description: Lists the authenticated user's contact groups.

functions.name: createGoogleContactGroup
functions.description: Creates a new contact group.

modules.name: Google Photos
modules.description: List albums, create albums, search media items, and batch upload in Google Photos.

functions.name: listGooglePhotosAlbums
functions.description: Lists the authenticated user's albums.

functions.name: getGooglePhotosAlbum
functions.description: Gets details of a specific album.

functions.name: createGooglePhotosAlbum
functions.description: Creates a new album.

functions.name: searchGooglePhotosMediaItems
functions.description: Searches for media items in a specific album or all items.

functions.name: getGooglePhotosMediaItem
functions.description: Gets details of a specific media item.

functions.name: batchGetGooglePhotosMediaItems
functions.description: Gets multiple media items by ID.

functions.name: uploadGooglePhotosMedia
functions.description: Uploads media bytes and gets an upload token.

functions.name: batchCreateGooglePhotosMediaItems
functions.description: Creates media items from upload tokens.

modules.name: Google Docs API
modules.description: Create, get, and batch update Google Docs documents including text replacement.

functions.name: getGoogleDoc
functions.description: Retrieves the full specified document.

functions.name: createGoogleDoc
functions.description: Creates a blank document with the specified title.

functions.name: batchUpdateGoogleDoc
functions.description: Applies a list of batch updates (requests) to a document.

functions.name: insertTextGoogleDoc
functions.description: Inserts text at a specific index.

functions.name: replaceAllTextGoogleDoc
functions.description: Replaces all occurrence of text within a document.

modules.name: Google Cloud Translation API
modules.description: Translate text and detect languages using Google Cloud Translation.

functions.name: translateText
functions.description: Translates text to a target language.

functions.name: detectLanguage
functions.description: Detects the language of text.

functions.name: getSupportedLanguages
functions.description: Gets languages supported by the Cloud Translation API.
